features: Melofo Garden Solar Stake Lights --- With attractive, modern designs, these bright solar garden lights create an elegant outdoor lighting experience. These beautiful and bright solar powered garden lights can be used for lighting the gardens, patios, paths, borders, ponds, driveways, walkway, yard or square at night. Perfect LED garden solar lights for creating a warm atmosphere to your wedding, festival party, birthday party, Christmas Day party, Thanksgiving Day, holiday party and more.

Solar Powered Outdoor Path Lighting --- Due to long-distance overseas transportation, pre charged solar energy may be depleted. Please ensure that it is solar charged for at least 6 to 8 hours before the first use (the switch must be turned on to "ON"). A high-efficiency solar panel means it can convert and store electricity, the light can stay on for up to 8 hours and also store energy. The light will turn on automatically at night and off during daylight. There is a switch for manual use.

Weather Resistant --- These pathway lights are constructed from premium stainless steel. Lights are resisted rust and corrosion and are well-protected against bad weather including snow, rain, wind, frost or sleet. They work wonderfully in your gardens and handle sprinklers with ease.

High Quality Garden Stick Light --- The well-made outside ground lights are built from high strength ABS material ensures a long lifespan. This Melofo solar lights adopt low-heat-emission and high energy conversion rate LED bulbs. Durable and safe to use, the LED string lights will not overheat after using it many hours. They also fitted with high quality cable to ensure constant use without breakage.

Easy to Install --- No tools need, these solar lights can be easily placed in positions where it's difficult to get mains power. Just turn on the switch under the solar patio light cap, then connect the disassembled stakes and insert the solar lawn light into the garden soil.
description: Product Description Melofo Pack of 10 Solar Powered Stake Lights LED Garden Outdoor Light Waterproof Stainless Steel Post Path Lights Main Features: 1. No wiring - Just install it to enjoy 2. Suitable for landscape, garden, sidewalks, roads, lawns, decks, docks, etc. 3. Automatic switch, stainless steel lamp column, transparent plastic lampshade 4.
